{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317415332DA4C0E77159E300349"}"},"total":2517},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7183547468943491840","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好看！！！兽世那篇真的很涩涩嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿[舔屏][舔屏]希望腰子大大继续努力嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿嘿[舔屏][舔屏][舔屏]放心大胆的写"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672550058,"group_id":"7171664497138994206","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7uV/tKQjtgvOQMiqKDTaZ8ar0wyeoXHW3pw9HgmYjkE","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9bfc7dfff1924f75be5d6b5e9c26c242~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791341&x-signature=dXnblOY4%2FCgmaNOOMjRkTUPv6h0%3D","user_id":"2925162670079184","user_name":"乱串的猴"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2925162670079184","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1709492535,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7171664497138994206","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿越、1v1、沙雕、甜宠、病娇、霸总、非人】
【单元剧，四对cp。软萌vs有体型差的糙汉，甜美vs疯批掌控欲强的霸总，小神婆vs病娇阴郁的神明，心大咸鱼vs小奶狗型创世者】
简单版文案：
宿舍四人一觉睡醒，集体穿越？
一个在原始森林里抱着一只老虎，艰难求生。
一个在西方魔幻世界里卖假药被抓，被分配去了伯爵的城堡里洗厕所。
一个在异界大陆逃荒，身边还跟着个永远吃不饱的拖油瓶傻弟弟。
还有最离谱的---干脆冲出地球，变成了废土星球上种花的园丁，天天给巨大的黑树浇水。
欢乐版文案：
①周云的心情非常微妙，因为她的生死之交老虎，突然变成了人！要和她搞对象？不然就吃了她？
②在勤恳扫厕所的苏娅，昨天和帅气阴郁的水管工吐槽伯爵的品味，今天城堡上下就开始重新装修了？
③萧冉眼看着傻弟弟吃下几百斤的烤肉后，高兴地瞳孔变成了竖线？嚯！不但不是青梅竹马的邻居弟弟，居然还是个妖怪？
④姜橙天天浇灌的大黑树，忽然有一天变成了小正太？养着养着，不过几个月，却成了漂亮的美少年，还是个爱吃醋的霸总？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob6f46a42518d88b4745ee3fb19242c94~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"折腰","author_id":"","book_id":"7171664497138994206","book_name":"快穿：姐妹一人一个大佬对象","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180808","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3927人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":32,"name":"幻想言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=32&name=幻想言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":380,"name":"病娇","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=380&name=病娇&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":461,"name":"群穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=461&name=群穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":464,"name":"异世穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=464&name=异世穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7171711506818531851","read_count":"3927","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"272885"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_po
